creator: hansruhe1@gmail.com
text:
As I am a newbie with these kind of requests please forgive me if I am not clear enough or perhaps missing information, but I do my best

When playing high resolution music files with the  extension .M4u Adacious fails to play them.

It appears that the necessary plugins are not included.

Fix: 

Can you please update the port for Adacious and include the audio codecs which enables Adacious to play the high resolution files. As there are licences under the Apache license , it is Open source, so no legal issues here .  The important information about that can be found on the following websites:

[1] http://alac.macosforge.org/
[2] http://www.freshports.org/audio/faac/

If you need more information, please let me know.
How-To-Repeat: Playing high resolution music files with the extension .M4u which is also be found in the MP4 files. When playing these files, Adacious fails to play them.
